findings.title: learn-planning-agent input contract expects learning_goal/session_folder, while learn:plan passes goal and omits session_folder
findings.impact: Increases chance of the planning agent ignoring caller context or hallucinating missing fields; harder to stabilize outputs.
findings.recommendation: Unify the contract (rename goal->learning_goal in caller, remove session_folder from agent contract, or explicitly support both).

findings.title: json-parser extracts only single-line JSON; multi-line JSON output would fail
findings.snippet: Scans lines backwards; returns the last line that JSON.parse() accepts
findings.impact: If any invoked CLI/tool prints pretty JSON (multi-line), parsing can fail and break learn flows.
findings.recommendation: Upgrade parsing to handle multi-line JSON objects (brace matching) while keeping the fast path.

findings.title: Strong: agent-caller centralizes retries/backoff and escapes single quotes for ccw cli prompts
findings.impact: Reduces flaky agent invocation and prevents prompt quoting breakage.
findings.recommendation: Reuse this helper for all ccw learn:* CLI calls that embed user-controlled strings.

areas_remaining: Agent schema drift (extra fields like estimated_effort)

leads.description: Inspect learn-plan-validator coverage beyond cycles (e.g. prerequisites consistency)
